jobs.title: HR Projects & Business Management Lead
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

This is a fantastic opportunity for a strategic and execution-focused Projects & Business Management Lead to join us and support the Business Area Head for People & Communications and the broader People & Communications function. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, operations, and transformation, ensuring that key initiatives across People, Culture, and Communications are effectively designed, executed, and delivered.You will act as a strategic partner and program leader, translating priorities into structured programs, driving cross-functional initiatives, and ensuring strong governance, reporting, and follow-through. A key focus of the role will be supporting the development of a modern, data-informed, and business-oriented People & Communications function, helping shape how the function operates, delivers value, and partners with the business.This role is ideal for someone who combines strategic thinking with hands-on project execution and enjoys working in a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.Program ManagementLead and manage strategic initiatives across People, Culture, Communications and Location Management.Translate functional strategy into structured programs, roadmaps, and execution plans.Coordinate cross-functional projects involving HR, Communications, Leadership, and other business teams.Track milestones, risks, budgets, and deliverables to ensure successful execution.Building a Modern People & Communications FunctionSupport the design and implementation of a modern, future-oriented People & Communications function working together with the DivisionsHelp define operating models, governance, and ways of working that enable strong business partnerships and impactful delivery.Contribute and/or drive initiatives related to employee experience, data-insight and digital HR, process improvement and CommunicationsIdentify opportunities to improve processes, increase impact, and leverage data and technology in decision-making.Contribute to strengthening the function’s role as a strategic partner to the business and a people advocateBusiness Management & Operational ExcellenceSupport the annual planning cycle for the BA, including strategic priorities, OKRs, and budgeting.Monitor performance and progress of key initiatives through dashboards and reporting.Ensure operational alignment and prioritization across the People & Communications organization.Improve processes, governance, and ways of working within the function.Executive SupportPrepare high-quality briefing materials, analysis, and presentations for executive leadership.Connects within the People & Communications functions as well as with our people across Avaloq to provide insights on trends, people engagement, culture, and communication effectiveness.Conduct research and benchmarking on best practices in people and communications strategy and organizational transformation.Support the preparation of materials for executive committees and board discussions.Change & TransformationDrive the planning and follows implementation of major people and culture initiatives.Coordinate change management and communication strategies to ensure successful adoption.Monitor impact and progress of transformation programs.Governance & Stakeholder CoordinationEstablish governance frameworks for major initiatives.Organize and support leadership forums, steering committees, and project boards.Ensure alignment across HR, Communications, and other business functions.Track decisions, actions, and accountability across strategic programs.

## Il tuo profilo

Strong track record of experience in strategy, consulting, program management, HR, or business operations.Experience leading complex cross-functional projects or transformation initiatives.Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate strategy into action.Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills with experience preparing executive-level presentations and reports.Highly organized with strong project management capabilities with the ability to navigate ambiguity and drive progress in a dynamic environment.

## Plus graditi

:Experience in management consulting, corporate strategy, or people strategy/HR transformation.Familiarity with people analytics, organizational design, digital HR tools, or culture initiatives.Experience working with senior executives or leadership teams.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. BenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 11 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues.We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers

jobs.title: Senior Technical Project Manager
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

This is a fantastic opportunity to join Avaloq in a Senior Project Manager role, where you will get the opportunity to manage projects within our global CTO organization, supporting the build and roll-out of new product functionalities or components, to our market-leading clients.As a key member of our Project Delivery organization, you will be responsible for leading and delivering complex projects from inception to completion, ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.Develop and maintain comprehensive project plans (regulatory and/ or innovation projects), including timelines and budgets, communicating with internal stakeholders (kernel development teams), Regional stakeholders, clients, etc.Manage Scope, Risks, Issues, and Quality along the entire lifecycle and in alignment with Top Management / C-suite executivesDevelop mitigation strategies to treat risks and resolve issues as they ariseEffectively communicate and provide weekly project status, progress, and potential roadblocks to Top Management / C-suite executivesBridge the gap between product vision and delivery-oriented approach – ensuring deadlines are met according to the project timelineLead cross-divisions / cross-functional project teams to achieve project objectives and milestonesOversee project budgets, ensuring Estimate To Complete (ETC) are constantly reviewed according to the project progressConduct post-project evaluations to identify areas for improvement and lessons learnedMentor and develop junior project managers and team members

## Il tuo profilo

8-10 years of Project Management experience, with a track record of successfully delivering complex cross-functional projects, at a senior level, within IaaS, PaaS, SaaS and/or BPaaS contextsProven track record of delivering results in a complex international and diverse environmentStrong knowledge of different project management methodologies (e.g.: Waterfall, Agile, etc.) and software (e.g.: Microsoft Project, Jira, etc.)Outstanding communication and presentation abilities, combined with natural ability to manage stakeholders at all levels Demonstrated ability to manage risks and develop effective treatment strategiesStrong problem-solving and decision-making capabilitiesAbility to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environmentAbility to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlinesStrong experience managing end-to end execution of complex programs that span multiple and cross-functional teams through software project lifecycleExceptional leadership and team motivation skillsAptitude to discuss technical details with developers and drive consensus among all stakeholdersIt would be a significant bonus if you have:Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalentExperience in leading RFI&RFP processes, vendor negotiation, contracting, hiring, and managing third partiesRelevant exposure to financial services industry

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 160 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. ## Il tuo profilo

8-10 years of Project Management experience, with a track record of successfully delivering complex cross-functional projects, at a senior level, within IaaS, PaaS, SaaS and/or BPaaS contextsProven track record of delivering results in a complex international and diverse environmentStrong knowledge of different project management methodologies (e.g.: Waterfall, Agile, etc.) and software (e.g.: Microsoft Project, Jira, etc.)Outstanding communication and presentation abilities, combined with natural ability to manage stakeholders at all levels Demonstrated ability to manage risks and develop effective treatment strategiesStrong problem-solving and decision-making capabilitiesAbility to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environmentAbility to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlinesStrong experience managing end-to end execution of complex programs that span multiple and cross-functional teams through software project lifecycleExceptional leadership and team motivation skillsAptitude to discuss technical details with developers and drive consensus among all stakeholdersIt would be a significant bonus if you have:Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalentExperience in leading RFI&RFP processes, vendor negotiation, contracting, hiring, and managing third partiesRelevant exposure to financial services industry

jobs.title: Offering Manager
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

As a member of the Offering team, you will drive upselling activities across assigned clients. You will act as the key link between the Key Account Manager and delivery teams (Solutions, Projects, Run), ensuring strong proposals, healthy margins, and high customer satisfaction.

## Le tue responsabilita

Contribute to meeting the yearly upselling targets by producing high‑quality, timely offers with a strong win rate (client sign‑off)Oversee and follow all elements of the upselling lifecycle, from high‑level estimation to final offeringAct as a Project Manager, managing time, quality, budget, and approvals for offers, serving as the SPOC for the client, KAM, and all required stakeholders, including third partiesSupport KAMs in establishing productive relationships with managed customers, ensuring customer satisfaction across all aspects related to offerings (services/products, solutions, financials, and time‑to‑market)Maintain accurate sales reporting information in company tools (e.g., CRM)

## Il tuo profilo

Business School degree or Bachelor in Economics / Business Administration2years of work experience, ideally in coordination, governance or administrative rolesGood organizational and coordination skillsHigh attention to detail and commitment to qualityGood communication skills and stakeholder management capabilityGood Knowledge of MS office toolsAbility to work independently and manage multiple topics in parallelA team player who is ready to provide backup and take over from colleagues when neededFluency in English

## Plus graditi

Power BI knowledge

jobs.title: Head of P&D Business Management
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

We are seeking an experienced, strategic, and highly structured leader to head the Business Management domain within the Product & Development (P&D) business area, specifically within Product Delivery & Quality division.In this role, you will ensure the P&D organisation operates smoothly, transparently, and in alignment with strategic and financial priorities.You will lead a domain encompassing Financial Planning, Quarterly Product Planning (or also known as QBR), Reporting, and Communications – while personally driving key strategic, organisational, and leadership initiatives.This role requires strong business acumen, willingness to drive the change providing input, excellent communication skills, and the ability to partner effectively across senior leadership, technology teams, Controlling, HR, Corporate Communications, Vendor Management, and other business functions.

## Le tue responsabilita

Drive P&D business strategy and ensure alignment across all divisionsCoordinate organisational design, workforce planning, and leadership offsitesOwn processes around positions approvals, external workforce approvals, data access governance, and support organisational changesOversee financial planning across P&D organisation, including APC, budgeting, forecasting, and TPR/TSR preparation and partner with Controlling to ensure consistent financial governance and reporting in order to support divisional leaders in financial steeringOwn and evolve the PMO service for P&D business areaEnsure data quality, consistency, and alignment with respect to capacity, demand, and budgetAct as escalation point for prioritisation and planning conflicts or inconsistenciesDefine, evolve, and prioritise the P&D reporting landscapeEnsure clear, reliable insights are available for senior leadership decision makingOwn P&D-wide communication strategy, including newsletters, Business Talks, and town-hallsEnsure P&D newsletters are issued timely, are engaging, and aligned with Corporate CommunicationsLead and coach your team, fostering collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvementDefine expectations, operating rhythms, and capability development across the Business Management organisationDrive a culture of trust, clarity, and operational excellence

## Il tuo profilo

Proven experience as a leader specifically in business management within a technology company, finance, or PMO in a complex organisation You will exhibit strong financial acumen and experience with budgeting, forecasting, and controllingAbility to translate strategy into structure, processes, and measurable outcomesStrong track record of working with data, reporting tooling, and KPI frameworksExcellent stakeholder management and communication skills at executive levelAbility to lead through complexity, prioritise across competing demands, and handle sensitive topics with discretionExperience of leading and managing a team and developing their performanceSolid experience in driving meaningful transformation in planning, reporting, communication, and strategy

## Informazioni aggiuntive

jobs.title: Internship in Banking Operations - Securities Transfer Team (12-months fixed term contract)
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

You will be part of a global team in three different locations (Germany, Switzerland, and Singapore), which is responsible for the transfers of securities (portfolio transfers and realignments), as well as the management of registered shares. Daily operational activities covering Equities, Bonds, Structure Notes, Mutual and Hedge Fund.

## Le tue responsabilita

Processing of incoming and outgoing securities transfers in Avaloq Banking SuiteProcessing of realignments between various custodians and marketsControl actions/coordination with clients, trade departments and custodiansCash and security reconciliationEnsuring that all transactions are processed correctly and settled in a timely mannerCompliance with Services Level Agreements (SLA), KRI/KPI and keeping oneself abreast of market/regulatory changes

## Il tuo profilo

Securities Transfer or Settlement experience is a plus, as well as Technology and Solutions skills (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, Clearstream Vestima, SWIFT, Bloomberg)Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and handles well during a stressful environmentA service-orientated team player and has a strong motivation to be part of a dynamic teamAn independent and proactive worker with good communication skillsFluency in English and German

At least 2-3 years of experience in Back Office Payments or similarExcellent communication and organization skillsHigh flexibility and willingness to learnGood team playerCapability to autonomously get around in a highly challenging, fast-paced and complex environmentProficiency in English and German

jobs.title: Apprendista di commercio AFC con Maturità
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

Apprendista di commercio AFCA partire da metà agosto 2026 siamo alla ricerca di un/a apprendista di commercio AFC presso la nostra sede a Bioggio.Durante i tre anni di apprendistato, ti offriamo la possibilità di imparare diversi compiti in ambito amministrativo all’interno di un’azienda leader del mercato svizzero per le soluzioni software bancario integrato.Inoltre, trascorrerai 2 giorni alla settimana presso la scuola di apprendistato commerciale e parteciperai di tanto in tanto a corsi interaziendali, dove potrai acquisire ulteriori conoscenze e competenze.Principali compiti e responsabilità: Fornire supporto amministrativo in varie aree, tra cui contabilità, risorse umane e facility managementConsulenza a clienti, fornitori e dipendenti al telefono o via e-mailOrganizzazione e coordinamento di riunioni ed eventi per vari teamCreazione ed elaborazione di documenti e presentazioniElaborazione e riconciliazione di fatture e pagamentiIn ogni reparto avrai un referente che si occuperà di te e sarà pronto ad aiutarti per qualsiasi domanda e a darti consigli.Se ti piace lavorare in gruppo e al computer, ti piace il contatto con le persone, sei affidabile e indipendente, allora l'apprendistato commerciale in Avaloq è la strada giusta per te.Sei pronto per il tuo futuro in Avaloq?

## Il tuo profilo

Requisiti necessari: Buon rendimento scolasticoSpiccato interesse per le tematiche economicheAdattabilità, motivazione e indipendenza e un forte senso di responsabilitàBuone doti organizzative e propensione al lavoro in teamAttenzione ai dettagli e precisioneItaliano fluente / madrelingua, conoscenza dell'ingleseDomicilio in SvizzeraIscrizione alla scuola di commercio

jobs.title: Internship in Banking Operations in Trade Processing CH (6-month fixed-term contract)
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

You will be part of a global team which is responsible for the Trade Processing of different products and their Settlement in the markets.

## Le tue responsabilita

Processing of stock exchange trades (mainly bonds, equities, eft and funds) in Avaloq Banking SuiteSettlement of Delivery and Receive versus payment (DVP and RVP trades)Ensuring that all transactions are processed correctly and settled in a timely mannerMonitoring settlement operations and failed tradesControl actions/coordination with clients, trade departments and custodiansCash and security reconciliationCompliance with Services Level Agreements (SLA) and KPI

## Il tuo profilo

Trade Processing or Settlement experience is a plus, as well as Technology and Solutions skills (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, SWIFT)Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and handles well during a stressful environmentA service-orientated team player and has a strong motivation to be part of a dynamic teamAn independent and proactive worker with good communication skills

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers

jobs.title: Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert - FiRE
jobs.description:
## Il ruolo

This role combines Swiss prudential regulation expertise with hands‑on ownership of the FiRE legal reporting platform and business analysis skills to translate regulation into technical requirements. As a Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert, you will be responsible for ensuring full and timely compliance with Swiss and Liechtenstein regulatory reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures, etc.) through the effective use, configuration, and enhancement of the FiRE reporting tool.

## Le tue responsabilita

Own the end‑to‑end regulatory reporting process in FiRE for SNB statistics, Basel IV capital, liquidity ratios, large exposures, market and country risk, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely submission to the competent authoritiesInterpret regulatory texts (FINMA circulars, SNB guidelines, Basel standards) and translate them into clear business rules, data mappings, and technical specifications for implementation in FiRE and upstream systemsMonitor regulatory developments affecting Swiss and cross‑border reporting and assess their impact on existing FiRE configurations, reporting logic, and data requirements; drive or coordinate corresponding change initiatives FiRE ownership and technical dutiesConfigure and maintain FiRE (interfaces and client configuration), in close cooperation with IT and the software provider, to reflect current legal requirements and bank‑specific needsDefine, document, and prioritise detailed functional and technical requirements for changes to FiRE and upstream data sources, based on regulatory interpretation and operational constraintsPerform and coordinate functional testing (SIT/UAT) for new FiRE releases and regulatory changes, including non‑regression tests, reconciliation checks, and defect management until production sign‑off Governance, controls and stakeholdersDesign and operate data quality and control frameworks around FiRE (validation checks, reconciliations with general ledger and risk systems, sign‑off workflows), and document procedures in line with internal policies and audit expectationsAct as primary point of contact for internal stakeholders (Finance, Risk, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legal) on Swiss regulatory reporting topics and for external stakeholders (FINMA, SNB, auditors) regarding FiRE‑generated reports

## Il tuo profilo

University degree in Finance, Economics, Law, or a related field, with 3–5+ years of experience in banking regulatory reporting or prudential regulation, ideally in the Swiss marketIn‑depth knowledge of Swiss prudential and statistical reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures), and proven ability to interpret and operationalise regulatory textsHands‑on experience with regulatory reporting tools, preferably FiRE (or similar solutions), including configuration, data mapping, and testing; strong understanding of banking products (loans, securities, derivatives, off‑balance‑sheet items)Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with high attention to detail and data quality, and the ability to challenge inconsistencies across systems and reportsExcellent communication skills, capable of drafting clear technical specifications and documentation and of bridging regulatory, business, and IT perspectivesTeam‑oriented, proactive, and autonomous working style, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlinesFluency in English plus German or French is preferred for roles in the Swiss banking sector

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 10 countries, and more than 160 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers
